trans-unit.target: Package '{0}' already exists at feed '{1}' and is invalid.

trans-unit.target: Package '{0}' already exists at feed '{1}'.

trans-unit.target: '-Source' switch is not provided. nupkg gets added to the 'Source' and is mandatory.

trans-unit.target: Add file '{0}' to package as '{1}'

trans-unit.target: Ambiguous option '{0}'. Possible values: {1}.

trans-unit.target: Argument cannot be null or empty.

trans-unit.target: Building project '{0}' for target framework '{1}'.

trans-unit.target: WARNING: {0}

trans-unit.target: Key '{0}' not found.

trans-unit.target: Please provide password for: {0}

trans-unit.target: Password:

trans-unit.target: The remote server indicated that the previous request was forbidden. Please provide credentials for: {0}
trans-unit.note: {0} will be replaced with the URL that needs credentials.

trans-unit.source: Password:
trans-unit.target: Password:

trans-unit.target: Please provide proxy credentials:

trans-unit.target: Please provide credentials for: {0}

trans-unit.target: UserName:

trans-unit.target: No description was provided for this command.

trans-unit.target: the symbol server

trans-unit.target: Error

trans-unit.source: The argument '{0}' is not expected.
trans-unit.target: The argument '{0}' is not expected.

trans-unit.source: The `pack` command for SDK-style projects is not supported, use `dotnet pack` or `msbuild -t:pack` to pack this project instead. You can override this behavior by setting the '{0}' environment variable to 'true'.
trans-unit.target: The `pack` command for SDK-style projects is not supported, use `dotnet pack` or `msbuild -t:pack` to pack this project instead. You can override this behavior by setting the '{0}' environment variable to 'true'.
trans-unit.note: 0 - environment variable name. Do not localize `SDK`, `dotnet pack`, msbuild -t:pack` and 'true'.

trans-unit.source: Cannot find the specified version of msbuild: '{0}'
trans-unit.target: Cannot find the specified version of msbuild: '{0}'

trans-unit.source: The resolved MSBuild directory is `{0}` which is an architecture-specific directory. Could not find MSBuild in its parent directory (non-architecture specific).
trans-unit.target: The resolved MSBuild directory is `{0}` which is an architecture-specific directory. Could not find MSBuild in its parent directory (non-architecture specific).

trans-unit.target: Cannot get the GetAllProjectFileNamesMethod from type Mono.XBuild.CommandLine.SolutionParser.

trans-unit.source: Cannot get type Mono.XBuild.CommandLine.SolutionParser.
trans-unit.target: Cannot get type Mono.XBuild.CommandLine.SolutionParser.

trans-unit.target: MsBuild timeout out while trying to get project to project references, and NuGet.exe failed to kill the process.

trans-unit.target: Cannot load type Microsoft.Build.Construction.ProjectInSolution from Microsoft.Build.dll

trans-unit.target: Cannot locate a solution file.

trans-unit.target: Cannot prompt for input in non-interactive mode.

trans-unit.target: Failed to create a temporary file while trying to get project to project references.

trans-unit.source: You are running the '{0}' operation with an 'HTTP' source: {1}. NuGet requires HTTPS sources. To use an HTTP source, you must explicitly set 'allowInsecureConnections' to true in your NuGet.Config file. Refer to https://aka.ms/nuget-https-everywhere for more information.
trans-unit.target: You are running the '{0}' operation with an 'HTTP' source: {1}. NuGet requires HTTPS sources. To use an HTTP source, you must explicitly set 'allowInsecureConnections' to true in your NuGet.Config file. Refer to https://aka.ms/nuget-https-everywhere for more information.

trans-unit.source: You are running the '{0}' operation with 'HTTP' sources: {1}. NuGet requires HTTPS sources. To use HTTP sources, you must explicitly set 'allowInsecureConnections' to true in your NuGet.Config file. Refer to https://aka.ms/nuget-https-everywhere for more information.
trans-unit.target: You are running the '{0}' operation with 'HTTP' sources: {1}. NuGet requires HTTPS sources. To use HTTP sources, you must explicitly set 'allowInsecureConnections' to true in your NuGet.Config file. Refer to https://aka.ms/nuget-https-everywhere for more information.

trans-unit.target: Error occurred when processing file '{0}': {1}

trans-unit.source: Invalid input '{0}'. Provide the path of an msbuild solution file instead. Support for XProj and standalone project.json files has been removed, to continue working with legacy projects use NuGet 3.5.x from https://nuget.org/downloads
trans-unit.target: Invalid input '{0}'. Provide the path of an msbuild solution file instead. Support for XProj and standalone project.json files has been removed, to continue working with legacy projects use NuGet 3.5.x from https://nuget.org/downloads

trans-unit.source: `project.json` pack is disabled in the current NuGet version, and will be permanently removed in a future version. Please consider migrating '{0}' to `PackageReference` and using the pack targets. You can set the '{1}' environment variable to 'true' to temporarily reenable this functionality.
trans-unit.target: `project.json` pack is disabled in the current NuGet version, and will be permanently removed in a future version. Please consider migrating '{0}' to `PackageReference` and using the pack targets. You can set the '{1}' environment variable to 'true' to temporarily reenable this functionality.
trans-unit.note: Please do not localize `project.json` pack and `PackageReference`. 0 - path, 1 - env var name

trans-unit.target: `project.json` pack is deprecated. Please consider migrating '{0}' to `PackageReference` and using the pack targets.
trans-unit.note: Do not localize project.json and `PackageReference` 0 - project path (project.json file path)

trans-unit.target: Nothing to do. This project does not specify any packages for NuGet to restore.

trans-unit.source: There is no default source, please specify a source.
trans-unit.target: There is no default source, please specify a source.

trans-unit.source: Pushing took too long. You can change the default timeout of 300 seconds by using the -Timeout <seconds> option with the push command.
trans-unit.target: Pushing took too long. You can change the default timeout of 300 seconds by using the -Timeout <seconds> option with the push command.

trans-unit.source: The property '{0}' on resource type '{1}' is not a type of ResourceManager.
trans-unit.target: The property '{0}' on resource type '{1}' is not a type of ResourceManager.

trans-unit.target: The resource type '{0}' does not have an accessible static property named '{1}'.

trans-unit.source: 'globalPackagesFolder' setting is a relative path. To determine full path, please specify either -SolutionDirectory or a solution file as a parameter. To ignore 'globalPackagesFolder' setting, specify -PackagesDirectory.
trans-unit.target: 'globalPackagesFolder' setting is a relative path. To determine full path, please specify either -SolutionDirectory or a solution file as a parameter. To ignore 'globalPackagesFolder' setting, specify -PackagesDirectory.

trans-unit.target: Cannot determine the packages folder to restore NuGet packages. Please specify either -PackagesDirectory or -SolutionDirectory.

trans-unit.source: Updating '{0}'...
trans-unit.target: Updating '{0}'...

trans-unit.source: Using '{0}' for metadata.
trans-unit.target: Using '{0}' for metadata.

trans-unit.source: Found packages.config. Using packages listed as dependencies
trans-unit.target: Found packages.config. Using packages listed as dependencies

trans-unit.source: '{0} {1}' is deprecated. Use '{0} {2}' instead.
trans-unit.target: '{0} {1}' is deprecated. Use '{0} {2}' instead.
trans-unit.note: {0} - name of the assembly running the command, e.g., NuGet {1} - current command marked as deprecated, e.g., list {2} - replacement command. For example, search

trans-unit.source: The value "{0}" for {1} is a sample value and should be removed.
trans-unit.target: The value "{0}" for {1} is a sample value and should be removed.

trans-unit.source: Replace with an appropriate value or remove and it and rebuild your package.
trans-unit.target: Replace with an appropriate value or remove and it and rebuild your package.

trans-unit.source: Remove sample nuspec values.
trans-unit.target: Remove sample nuspec values.

trans-unit.source: '{0}' key already exists in Properties collection. Overriding value.
trans-unit.target: '{0}' key already exists in Properties collection. Overriding value.

trans-unit.source: '{0}' was included in the project but doesn't exist. Skipping...
trans-unit.target: '{0}' was included in the project but doesn't exist. Skipping...

trans-unit.source: Invalid PackageSaveMode value '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Invalid PackageSaveMode value '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: Please enbale long file path support in local group policy. Fore more details, please refer to https://aka.ms/nuget-long-path.
trans-unit.target: Please enbale long file path support in local group policy. Fore more details, please refer to https://aka.ms/nuget-long-path.

trans-unit.source: Please install .NET Framework 4.6.2 or above that supports long file paths. Fore more details, please refer to https://aka.ms/nuget-long-path.
trans-unit.target: Please install .NET Framework 4.6.2 or above that supports long file paths. Fore more details, please refer to https://aka.ms/nuget-long-path.

trans-unit.source: Long file path is currently only supported on Windows 10. Fore more details, please refer to https://aka.ms/nuget-long-path.
trans-unit.target: Long file path is currently only supported on Windows 10. Fore more details, please refer to https://aka.ms/nuget-long-path.

trans-unit.source: MsbuildPath : {0} is using, ignore MsBuildVersion: {1}.
trans-unit.target: MsbuildPath : {0} is using, ignore MsBuildVersion: {1}.

trans-unit.source: Option 'NoPrompt' has been deprecated. Use 'NonInteractive' instead.
trans-unit.target: Option 'NoPrompt' has been deprecated. Use 'NonInteractive' instead.

trans-unit.source: Error reading msbuild project information, ensure that your input solution or project file is valid. NETCore and UAP projects will be skipped, only packages.config files will be restored.
trans-unit.target: Error reading msbuild project information, ensure that your input solution or project file is valid. NETCore and UAP projects will be skipped, only packages.config files will be restored.

trans-unit.source: Version "{0}" does not follow semantic versioning guidelines.
trans-unit.target: Version "{0}" does not follow semantic versioning guidelines.

trans-unit.source: Update your nuspec file or use the AssemblyInformationalVersion assembly attribute to specify a semantic version as described at http://semver.org.
trans-unit.target: Update your nuspec file or use the AssemblyInformationalVersion assembly attribute to specify a semantic version as described at http://semver.org.

trans-unit.source: Use semantic versioning
trans-unit.target: Use semantic versioning

trans-unit.source: '{0}' was included in the project but the path could not be resolved. Skipping...
trans-unit.target: '{0}' was included in the project but the path could not be resolved. Skipping...

trans-unit.source: The version of dependency '{0}' is not specified.
trans-unit.target: The version of dependency '{0}' is not specified.

trans-unit.source: Specify the version of dependency and rebuild your package.
trans-unit.target: Specify the version of dependency and rebuild your package.

trans-unit.source: Specify version of dependencies.
trans-unit.target: Specify version of dependencies.

trans-unit.source: {0} was not specified. Using '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: {0} was not specified. Using '{1}'.
